---
layout: cv
title: Jaime José Gutierrez Zevallos
---
# Jaime José Gutierrez Zevallos
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science candidate — Frontend & Cloud Developer.


<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:jaimegut3005@gmail.com">jaimegut3005@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="tel:2087603938">208-760-3938</a>
| <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/jaime-gutierrez-z/">LinkedIn</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/Jsime34/">GitHub</a>
</div>



## Education


`Expected July`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__, Rexburg, Idaho


- Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
- GPA: 3.88



## Experience


`January 2024 - Present`
__Technology Expert__, Agronegocios e Inversiones Gutierrez, Arequipa, Peru


- Set up and maintained email systems, cloud storage, and remote access for staff.
- Gained experience in customer service, problem-solving, and real-world tech support.
- Diagnosed and resolved hardware, software, and network issues across multiple devices.


`August 2025 - September 2025`
__English Tutor (Volunteer)__, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, Remote


- Teach conversational and basic English to a small group of members in my home ward.
- Plan weekly lessons and tailor content to students' learning levels and goals.
- Develop communication and leadership skills by mentoring and encouraging students in their progress.
- Foster a supportive learning environment that builds confidence and unity.


`September 2024 - December 2024`
__Team Member__, BYU-Idaho Food Services, Rexburg, Idaho


- Provided fast, friendly customer service in a high-paced mobile kitchen environment.
- Assisted with food prep, cooking, and maintaining health & safety standards.
- Managed inventory restocking and collaborated closely with team members, developing teamwork skills.



## Projects


- Built the frontend web page for Agronegocios e Inversiones Gutierrez using React, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript, delivering a responsive, modern interface to showcase the company's products and services.
- Helped develop, test, and deploy the operational system for Agronegocios e Inversiones Gutierrez on the AWS cloud, ensuring reliable performance and scalable infrastructure for daily business operations.
- Argus: Contributing to frontend development at Elixir, building responsive, accessible user interfaces and collaborating with the team to deliver an intuitive user experience with clean, maintainable code.



## Hard Skills


- Python
- SQL
- CSS
- HTML
- C++



## Soft Skills


- Eager to learn
- Teamwork
- Leadership
- Problem-solving



<!-- ### Footer


Last updated: July 2026 -->
